title: Jelly Beans Mod!
description: Little and nice mod that adds Jelly Beans with its respective ores, armor and tools to Minecraft!
body:
- A little mod made in MCreator that adds some Jelly Beans related stuff.
- This mod adds: Jelly Bean, Eaten Jelly Bean (used to craft Jelly Bean), Jelly Bean Tools (pickaxe, sword, axe, hoe and shovel ) and Jelly Bean Armor (helmet, chestplate, leggins and boots), Jelly Bean ore (gem like), Jelly Bean Ore Block, and Jelly Bean Ore Ore (idk why i called it like that)![All of the items!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44766d0cf86b9bc6889ba2015a71451bd30fe58f.png), some advancments which i won't spoil of course, some recipes and that's basically it!
- Now u may ask why download this mod? Well, if u like new ores, new food, new armor and new tools, then thats the reason u would want to download this mod!
- Additional Info: Fabric 1.20.1 requires "Fabric API", that's it!
